name: LG_UPDSHIPPEDAMOUNTORD_524_01
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE LG_UPDSHIPPEDAMOUNTORD_524_01 (@pOrdTransRef INT)
AS
BEGIN
 DECLARE @clogicalRef INT
  ,@csourceLink INT
  ,@ctransDate DATETIME
  ,@cAmount FLOAT
  ,@cUnit1CFact FLOAT
  ,@cUnit2CFact FLOAT
 DECLARE cStline CURSOR
 FOR
 SELECT LOGICALREF
  ,SOURCELINK
  ,DATE_
  ,AMOUNT
  ,UINFO1
  ,UINFO2
 FROM LG_524_01_STLINE WITH(NOLOCK)
 WHERE ORDTRANSREF = @pOrdTransRef
 OPEN cStline
 FETCH NEXT
 FROM cStline
 INTO @clogicalRef
  ,@csourceLink
  ,@ctransDate
  ,@cAmount
  ,@cUnit1CFact
  ,@cUnit2CFact
 WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
 BEGIN
  EXECUTE LG_UPDSHIPPEDAMOUNT_524_01 @clogicalRef
   ,@pOrdTransRef
   ,@csourceLink
   ,@cAmount
   ,@ctransDate
   ,@cUnit1CFact
   ,@cUnit2CFact
   ,1
  FETCH NEXT
  FROM cStline
  INTO @clogicalRef
   ,@csourceLink
   ,@ctransDate
   ,@cAmount
   ,@cUnit1CFact
   ,@cUnit2CFact
 END
 CLOSE cStline
 DEALLOCATE cStline
END
